name: Chaarat Gold Holdings Ltd
description: Chaarat Gold Holdings Ltd is an exploration and development company with assets in the Kyrgyz Republic. The company's principal activity is the development of the Chaarat Gold Project, which includes the Tulkubash and Kyzyltash deposits. Chaarat aims to build a leading emerging-markets gold producer through organic growth and selective acquisitions, focusing on high-value, low-cost operations in Central Asia and the Commonwealth of Independent States.
